h2ce5de7ag5231g426agb97agb6ec5e5a67a1: I'm alive, yes. Thank you for the concern.
hf7d1b6c7g143eg4b29gbca3g2e5982bc84ff: I was hoping you might know that.
had4d1f05gce3dg496ag955fg09e36bac706e: I remember the ship, I remember falling... then nothing.
h9e414052gd97dg4d3bg947eg11d65c7458a7: What happened to my kin? Did you see her?
h5f403b89g0900g463cg95ccge54bce5b5097: What happened to our gith friend?
he2a9322ag350cg4935ga62bg06fa39fef5e1: She must have run off without us... seems like I'm more reliable than your own people.
h6c51cce2g4f3eg4813g9dadg4f9cd66b5227: You might want to reconsider calling her a friend - looks like she ran off without us.
h32a3dd03g3f42g4f77gada8gcbe02d64c0c9: We should look for her - she might be injured, or worse.
h094097cdgd6a4g4bb8gb256g881b2e9ef814: You're more concerned for her than she is for you, clearly. We need to take care of ourselves.
h4c213a13gbd17g48e4gb2a1g2ad32a452e88: First things first - we need supplies, shelter, and most of all, a healer.
hdce2c265g45f8g49f1gac1bg813efe9ff48f: We might have escaped, but we still have these little monsters in our heads.
h30089ca9g4b86g4ce3ga5afg4016ba332ba7: We need each other, and we both know what's at stake. I can't think of better company.
he0512170ga563g4592gabcdg5101f8204eff: No. This is where we part ways.
hc89b0576g18afg4391g9b15g8efb382e8d13: You sure about that? Neither of us knows what lies ahead.
h968c2723gedc1g43bdg8e78gc70a50c2dd54: All right, fine. Let's stay together.
h63244027g2340g4106g97d5gedcbbe7499ac: Wait. Perhaps we shouldn't. You're not the one I need to talk to, are you? Not really.
hb74337ffg5b5eg4671gb480gb94a930958b0: I can feel it, in your head. You follow someone else's orders. I'll deal with them, not you.
h9a7753b1g5790g41e1g9314g52f9e444c3cb: I have to get moving. Perhaps our paths will cross again later.
hc6e4fc73g46d4g45cegbcedg9b14521350cb: Wait - after all that, you won't join me?
h9790b576gac74g44e4g86a8ge81bd4dd3239: I'll join along - if I can speak to whoever's really in charge. Otherwise, I'd best be on my way.
hd11964f3g0597g4b9fgb2fag452bafc1c594: You know, I think I'd rather take my chances without you.
h243fb433ga364g4bbbga70cg3b957be2ff50: Perhaps we'll meet again. If you survive, that is.
h63a83c6ag5197g468cg97f3g730b3ef493e9: You seem overburdened with hangers-on already.
h4fdbcf82g0674g4ddbgaa42g933cce944030: I'll mark my camp on your map. You can rest there.
h8fffc8cagc979g4154g8633gb7771491c819: One thing, just before we go. I wanted to thank you again, for freeing me.
h62a47aa0g30cfg443bga478g031445fe530c: It would've been all too easy for you to run right past my pod, but you didn't. I'll remember that.
h43e4c08eg4447g40c6g8b55g0d9d5b113822: I'm sure. Best if you head on your way now.
hcc3801e7g1309g4fcbg9c9eg75248b6faf62: 'We'? You want to come with me?
h8fa0c370g1c30g486cg9b8fg444a4d82ffcf: Do you have any idea where we are?
h44e19980gf650g4470g8ee2g532729cf901f: No... I don't recognise this place. But anything's an improvement on where we just came from.
hc3abba92g34f9g48b0gbb57g88b9770c6d65: You want to stay together, I take it?
h2d943df4g8148g40bag84b9g7bcaf59f728b: You want to join me, I take it?
h862d5641gd292g4724g97b9g43841ca01d6b: What happened to my kin? Did you see her?
hc7359106g0b42g4e0eg9720g98750150d3e5: What happened to our gith friend?
h843a0437g85b9g4486gb37fga06c46f702b2: I should look for her - she might be injured, or worse.
h4417393age311g4ab7ga79bg27062437cc47: Do you have any idea where we are?
hd27266b7ge70fg4c77ga06dg34900784783b: True. Seems like we're the lucky ones, judging by all the corpses strewn about.
h659b78dbg896ag41aag9cf8g94b9e81b734d: I wanted to see if you'd anything worth taking.
h4744075eg5713g4fd8g9916g1b9085f54b27: Well that's honest of you. Don't do it again - I'll give you a pass this time, considering I owe you my life.
h10abf65ag74d4g43b7gb103gf49cbfd562d6: You're alive. I'm alive. How is this possible...?
